rationale: Documentation bug: rdoc for Collection#find incorrectly describes read option format; no spec violation.
Performance regression in BSON deserialization between driver versions; no specific spec rule contradicted.
Vague 'suspicious code' in topology.rb; insufficient detail to identify spec violation.
Ruby warning about private method forwarding in Cursor#limit; internal implementation warning, no spec rule.
Adding 'comment' parameter to aggregate; Improvement with inward Depends from DRIVERS-377, spec rollout work not a bug.
Sessions spec requires lsid sent with all commands including explain; driver failed to send session id with find/aggregate explain.
API ergonomics complaint about map_reduce Enumerable API shadowing; no spec requirement violated.
Driver caches volatile IP addresses instead of hostnames; implementation issue in address resolution, no specific SDAM spec rule.
Regression bug: primary detection fails in 2.5.x vs 2.4.3; no specific SDAM spec rule named, support/regression issue.
Mongoid.purge! fails after upgrade due to server selection error; Mongoid integration issue, not spec nonconformance.
Internal refactor associating SessionPool with Cluster instead of Client; architecture improvement, no spec behavior change.
Missing require for Ruby Forwardable constant; internal Ruby loading bug, no spec involvement.
Spec change (commit linked) requires reducing implicit session leaks; driver must implement updated spec behavior.
Config key symbolization bug for :mode settings; internal Ruby hash key handling, no spec rule violated.
Deprecating snapshot option per SPEC-1033/DRIVERS-454; Improvement/spec rollout, not a driver bug.
NoMethodError on upsert in bulk write with w:0; implementation bug in error handling path, cannot identify specific spec rule violated.
Regression: 'cannot delete from system namespace' error after 2.5.1->2.5.2 upgrade; regression bug, no spec rule.
Adding validation for read mode option; API improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
IPv6 address parsing bug when using #with; implementation bug in address formatting, no specific spec rule named.
Re-sync transaction spec tests for new UnknownTransactionCommitResult label tests from specs repo commit.
Primary detection regression in 2.5.x; symptom-based report with no specific SDAM spec rule identified as violated.
Resync retryable writes spec tests; depends on SPEC-1005/DRIVERS-476, test infrastructure update.
Spec (SPEC-905) says aggregate for change stream must not be retried; description says 'if any driver has implemented retry...they will need to ensure.'
Spec update requires omitting default startAtOperationTime at creation; driver must use operationTime from initial aggregate on resume.
Test suite uses wrong URI option name 'replica_set' instead of 'replicaSet'; internal test suite bug, not driver behavior.
Request to provide transactions code examples for documentation; docs task, no spec involvement.
Driver documented startAtClusterTime but didn't implement it; change stream resume requires startAtOperationTime implementation.
Verifying change stream resume behavior: aggregate never retried, getMore retried once; implementing spec-required resume logic.
Adding try_next method modeled after Java driver's tryNext; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule violated.
SSL performance issue reading large documents; OpenSSL buffer allocation performance problem, no spec involvement.
Read preference mode sent as 'primary_preferred' (underscore) instead of 'primaryPreferred' (camelCase); wire protocol spec violation.
Adding optional linter tool for driver development validation; internal dev tooling improvement, no spec behavior.
Driver discards actual OpenSSL error replacing with generic message; error reporting quality issue, no spec rule.
Session#start_transaction options missing from rdoc; documentation bug, no spec violation.
Skip parallelCollectionScan tests on server 4.1+ where feature was removed; test suite maintenance, no spec rule.
Document need to restart monitoring thread after fork; documentation improvement, no spec violation.
CI configuration: adding ruby-head builds to Evergreen; build/CI infrastructure, no spec involvement.
Update driver support matrix documentation for version 2.6; docs maintenance task, no spec involvement.
noCursorTimeout regression from 2.4.3 to 2.5.1; symptom-based regression report, no specific cursor spec rule identified.
BSON::Document#fetch doesn't handle symbol keys; Ruby-specific BSON Document API bug, not a BSON wire spec issue.
Driver removes secondary from topology on Unknown isMaster response; explicitly stated 'does not follow the SDAM specification.'
Adding transaction example code to driver tutorial documentation; docs improvement, no spec violation.
Client#use API documentation incorrectly describes method behavior; documentation bug, no spec rule violated.
Intermittent test failure in try_next change stream test; flaky test infrastructure issue, not driver spec behavior.
Publishing BSON API docs to api.mongodb.com; documentation hosting task, no spec involvement.
BSON::Document#slice broken with Rails 5.2 due to ActiveSupport removal; Ruby/Rails compatibility bug, not a BSON spec issue.
Update bson-ruby test matrix to add Ruby versions; CI/build configuration, no spec involvement.
Add per-test wall clock timeout to prevent stuck CI builds; test infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior.
Document JRuby support in driver docs; documentation task, no spec involvement.
Test against Ruby 2.5 latest instead of 2.5.0 on Evergreen; CI configuration, no spec involvement.
